---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for ARIX-Algo
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem
What problem does this feature solve? Be specific.

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature in detail. Include API design, architecture changes, or references.

## Alternatives Considered
What other approaches have you considered and why is this one better?

## Additional Context
Links to related discussions, papers, or prior art.

> **BDFL governance**: The BDFL decides all features. No voting. Feature requests are tracked but acceptance is at the BDFL's sole discretion.
